mapper.insert: merge into total_interaction_log as target using (select #{uniqueid} as interaction_id) as source on (target.interaction_id = source.interaction_id) when matched then UPDATE SET source_id = #{linkedid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rec_file = #{rec_file, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, result_cd = ISNULL(#{result_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target.result_cd), keyword = ISNULL(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target.keyword), status = '300' when not matched then insert (interaction_id, cmpycd, media_type, source_id, direction, src_no, dst_no, start_time, status, result_cd, rec_file, keyword, callback_yn, callback_no, callback_retry_cnt, callback_req_time) VALUES (#{uniqueid}, #{cmpycd}, ISNULL(#{media_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'CALL'), #{linkedid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{direction, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{src_no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dst_no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISNULL(#{start_time, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE()), '010', '100', #{rec_file, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISNULL(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{src_no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{callback_yn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{callback_no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{callback_retry_cnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{callback_req_time, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP});
mapper.update: UPDATE TOTAL_INTERACTION_LOG SET ANSWER_TIME = GETDATE(), STATUS = '200', RESULT_CD = '200', EXTEN = #{exten, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USERID = #{userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXT_DATA = '{"queue_nm":"' + ISNULL(#{queue_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') + '"}' WHERE INTERACTION_ID = #{uniqueid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE TOTAL_INTERACTION_LOG SET END_TIME = GETDATE(), TALK_SEC = DATEDIFF(SECOND, ISNULL(answer_time, start_time), GETDATE()), HANGUP_CAUSE = #{hangup_cause, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESULT_CD = #{result_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REC_FILE = #{rec_file, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = '300' WHERE INTERACTION_ID = #{uniqueid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select useyn from haba900t_tbl where cdtype = '605' and codecd = '000'
SELECT dt FROM holiday WHERE dt = #{dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select inner_no from haba920t_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and userid = #{userid}

select b.custcd, b.custnm, isnull(a.name, b.bossnm) as usernm, b.telno as company_tel, isnull(a.phoneno, b.telno) as hpno, b.address, b.email, b.custgbn, b.status from phone_number_map a inner join haba020t_tbl b on b.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.custcd = b.custcd where replace(a.phoneno, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '-', '') and a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT SUBSTRING(#{svcymd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 6) + RIGHT('000000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(SVCNO, 7, 6) AS INT)), 0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 6) AS SVCNO FROM CALL_MST_TBL WHERE CMPYCD = #{cmpycd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SUBSTRING(SVCNO, 1, 6) = SUBSTRING(#{svcymd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 6)
mapper.insert: insert into call_mst_tbl (cmpycd, svcno, deptcd, custcd, svcymd, iono, itemcd, trb_ment, ans_ment, ai_summary, start_time, end_time, consultid, rec_file, escalation_yn, escalation_no, esc_memo, happycall_yn, interaction_id, linkedid, call_telno, call_usernm, call_email, addtime, updtime, updemp) values (#{cmpycd}, #{svcno}, #{deptcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{svcymd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{iono, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trb_ment, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ans_ment, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ai_summary, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{start_time, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{end_time, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{consultid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rec_file, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{escalation_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{escalation_no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{esc_memo, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{happycall_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interaction_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISNULL(#{linkedid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'MANUAL'), #{call_telno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{call_usernm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{call_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{updemp, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update call_mst_tbl set trb_ment = #{trb_ment, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ANS_MENT = #{ans_ment, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, AI_SUMMARY = #{ai_summary, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ITEMCD = #{itemcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IONO = #{iono, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SVCYMD = #{svcymd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ESCALATION_YN = #{escalation_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ESCALATION_NO = #{escalation_no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ESC_MEMO = #{esc_memo, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, REC_FILE = #{rec_file, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INTERACTION_ID = #{interaction_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LINKEDID = ISNULL(#{linkedid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'MANUAL'), CALL_TELNO = #{call_telno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CALL_USERNM = #{call_usernm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CALL_EMAIL = #{call_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HAPPYCALL_YN = #{happycall_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDTIME = GETDATE(), UPDEMP = #{updemp, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE CMPYCD = #{cmpycd} AND SVCNO = #{svcno}
mapper.delete: delete from call_mst_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and svcno = #{svcno}
mapper.select: select * from call_mst_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and svcno = #{svcno}
mapper.insert: insert into cti_escalation_tbl (svcno, linkedid, reg_date, sender_id, deptcd, summary, esc_memo, status, addtime, updtime, updemp) values (#{svcno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISNULL(#{linkedid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'MANUAL'), GETDATE(), #{sender_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{summary, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{esc_memo, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, '100', GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{sender_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into call_monitor_tbl (cmpycd, svcno, [row], moniternm, addtime, updtime, updemp) VALUES (#{cmpycd}, #{svcno}, #{row}, #{moniternm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{updemp, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from call_monitor_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and svcno = #{svcno}
mapper.select: select a.salsymd, b.itemnm, a.iono, a.itemcd from hsio102t_tbl a left outer join hsba010t_tbl b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.itemcd = b.itemcd WHERE A.CMPYCD = #{cmpycd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CUSTCD = #{custcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.IOGBN = '200' AND A.CFMYN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SALSYMD DESC

select a.svcno, format(a.start_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm') as start_time, a.ai_summary, a.trb_ment, a.ans_ment, b.usernm as consultnm, a.rec_file, a.call_telno as hpno, a.call_usernm, a.call_email from call_mst_tbl a left outer join haba920t_tbl b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.consultid = b.userid WHERE A.CMPYCD = #{cmpycd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CUSTCD = #{custcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.START_TIME DESC
SELECT * FROM CTI_TRANSFER_TBL WHERE LINKEDID = #{linkedid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO CTI_TRANSFER_TBL AS target USING (SELECT #{linkedid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} as linkedid) AS source ON (target.linkedid = source.linkedid) when matched then update set from_exten = #{from_exten, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_EXTEN = #{to_exten, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRANSFER_CNT = ISNULL(target.TRANSFER_CNT, 0) + 1, UPDTIME = GETDATE() when not matched then insert (linkedid, cmpycd, from_exten, to_exten, transfer_cnt, addtime, updtime) VALUES (#{linkedid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpycd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{from_exten, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{to_exten, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, GETDATE(), GETDATE());
